applicability_notes: Replaces torch.full_like(x, v); shape/dtype taken from input tensor. Supports in-place reuse via output_tensor=input (used for zeroing KV caches). Validated for bfloat16, float32, int32, uint32, uint16.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: large persistent KV/KVPE cache tensor (full decode cache)
placement_observations.source: model call site: ttnn.fill(cache, 0.0, memory_config=cache.memory_config(), output_tensor=cache) — DeepSeek generator KV/KVPE cache reset, memory_config inherited from existing cache allocation
unit tests: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default DRAM interleaved memory config across bfloat16/float32/int32/uint32/uint16
